title: BetterRecipes
description: Adds a bunch of recipes to minecraft
body:
# Better Recipes

Adds a bunch of recipes to minecraft, including many uncraftable items in a fair and balanced way.

<details>
<summary>Bulk Crafting Recipes</summary>

## Bowls

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/bowl.gif)

## Cauldrons

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/cauldron.png)

## Chains

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/chain.png)

## Chests

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/chest.gif)

## Sticks

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/stick.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Faster Crafting Recipes</summary>

# Faster Crafting Recipes

These are recipes that are primarily meant for ease-of-use.

## Chest Minecart

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/chest_minecart.gif)

## Furnace Minecart

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/furnace_minecart.png)

## Hopper Minecart

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/hopper_minecart.png)

## Dispenser

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/dispenser.gif)

## Flint

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/flint.png)

## Hopper

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/hopper.gif)

## Jack o' Lantern

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/jack_o_lantern.gif)

## Trapped Chests

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/trapped_chest.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Feature Recipes</summary>

# Feature Recipes

These are recipes that are meant to add new features to the game, through giving crafts to previously uncraftable items.

## Anvil Repair

Allows for the repairing of anvils.

- Chipped Anvil + 1 iron block -> Anvil
- Cracked Anvil + 1 Iron Block -> Chipped Anvil
- Cracked Anvil + 2 Iron Blocks -> Anvil

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/anvil.gif)

## Bell

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/bell.png)

## Chorus Fruit Smelting

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/chorus_fruit.gif)

Additionally, chorus fruit can be placed on a campfire.

## Cobwebs

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/cobweb.png)

## Horse Armor

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/horse_armor.gif)

## Jukebox

Allows for creating a jukebox from amethyst instead of diamonds.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/jukebox.gif)

## Smelting Rotten Flesh to Leather

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/leather.gif)

## Craftable Mushroom Blocks

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/mushroom.gif)

## Name Tags

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/name_tag.png)

## Ores

All ore recipes have been balanced so the returns from breaking it with fortune 3 will be less than the cost of the recipe.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/ore.gif)

## Pointed Dripstone

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/pointed_dripstone.png)

## Decompress Quartz

Allows you to store your quartz in block form, and still use the item for redstone recipes.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/quartz.png)

## Smelting Raw Copper Blocks

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/raw_copper.gif)

## Smelting Raw Gold Blocks

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/raw_gold.gif)

## Smelting Raw Iron Blocks

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/raw_iron.gif)

## Saddle

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/saddle.png)

## Shulkerbox

Allows you to craft a shulker box without first crafting a chest.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/shulkerbox.gif)

## Soul Sand & Soul Soil conversion

Allows converting soul sand to soul soil and vice-versa.
This makes soul soil renewable, as soul sand already is from bartering.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/soul.gif)

## Wool to String Conversion

Makes it easier to gather and store large amounts of string.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/solonovamax/BetterRecipes/master/assets/string.png)

</details>
